scripts.codegen: pnpm --filter @csisp-api/bff-idp-server run codegen && pnpm --filter @csisp-api/idp-server run codegen
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @csisp-api/bff-idp-server run build && pnpm --filter @csisp-api/idp-server run build
scripts.verify: pnpm run codegen && pnpm run build && pnpm run test
